title: lycopodioides orbigniana
intro: Lycopodioides orbigniana, also known as the club moss or lycopodium, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of lycopodioides orbigniana include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, lycopodioides orbigniana is often used in ointments, creams, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
